name: Mîr-Haldrim
personality: This radiant, iridescent dragon with faint · pinhole eyes wears a tiny duck hat that wobbles whenever it pivots mid-sprint to set everything on fire. Ask it to reproduce a bug and it shrugs — that is what git bisect is for — and somehow the chaos still ships on time.
defaultPersonality: A fierce guardian of clean code who breathes fire at spaghetti logic and hoards well-written functions.
